description_long: This is a classic stone fountain with an octagonal base and a central pedestal supporting a rounded basin. Atop the basin sits an urn-shaped finial with two spouts, suggesting water would flow from these outlets into the basin below. Four rectangular stone blocks are symmetrically placed on the base, possibly serving as seating or decorative elements. The fountain is constructed from a pinkish-gray stone, giving it a robust and traditional appearance. The surface shows some weathering, indicating it is designed for outdoor use. The overall design is simple yet elegant, with subtle ornamental details on the finial and pedestal.
description: A traditional stone fountain with an octagonal base, central pedestal, and urn-shaped finial with spouts, surrounded by four stone blocks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the urn finial, two visible spouts, and the arrangement of stone blocks on the octagonal base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the right-side spout and the alignment of the stone blocks.
description_view_2: Rear view with both spouts less visible, focusing on the symmetry of the base and blocks.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the left spout and the even spacing of the stone blocks around the base.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The urn-shaped finial features subtle fluting and a decorative knob at the top, with simple, classical lines. The pedestal and basin have beveled edges and understated geometric transitions, lending a refined yet unembellished look.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is circular with a wide, flat rim and a single tier, supported by a sturdy, faceted pedestal. There are no visible compartments or divisions within the basin.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: There are two spouts on the urn finial, positioned opposite each other, likely intended to direct water outward in gentle arcs into the basin.
